definition: certificate for which it is confirmed that the product corresponds to the significant technical specifications and is subjected to a factory-internal production control

definition_ml.en: certificate for which it is confirmed that the product corresponds to the significant technical specifications and is subjected to a factory-internal production control
definition_ml.fr: certificat par lequel il est confirmé que le produit correspond aux spécifications techniques essentielles et est soumis à un contrôle de production en interne
definition_ml.de: Zertifikat für das bestätigt ist, dass das Produkt den signifikanten technischen Spezifikationen entspricht und einer produktionsinternen Produktkontrolle unterzogen wird.
definition_ml.zh: 用于确认产品符合重要技术规范和受到工厂内部生产控制的证书
